operational_knowledge_units.title: Overview of WCS and OptiSweep database groups
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide provides an overview of database-related areas in the environment, grouped into WCS Databases, OptiSweep Databases, and SQL Jobs.
observed_evidence: Sub-items: Audit (Geek Comm Module), GeekAgv (Geek Comm Module), OPCComms, Robotics, SorterSweeper
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Overview slide listing database areas for the OptiSweep environment. WCS Databases include DataContainers, EntityLogs, and PLCCommunication. OptiSweep Databases include Audit (Geek Comm Module), GeekAgv (Geek Comm Module), OPCComms, Robotics, and SorterSweeper. SQL Jobs is also listed as part of the overview.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as a procedure candidate because slide 64 is an overview of database groups and SQL Jobs, not an action sequence. It provides database references for WCS and OptiSweep but no explicit steps, validations, or operational instructions.
